tweet_text: 🚨 HUGE NEWS: Tottenham's interim manager Igor Tudor has been charged with misconduct for claiming referee Thomas Bramall favored the "home team" in their loss to Fulham. ⚽️🔍 #Tottenham #RefereeControversy
